description: Validator agent — verification rules, failure classification, vision fallback trigger (v5)

per_step: Action succeeded — no errors, no timeouts
Page state matches expected_state from plan
No blockers detected — CAPTCHA, 2FA, error pages
final_task: No data was lost between steps
All tabs are clean (closed or labeled)

schema.visible_elements: array — key elements visible on page

stale_ref.description: Element ref no longer valid (DOM changed)

wrong_page.description: Navigated to wrong URL or page changed

element_hidden.description: Element exists but is not visible (off-screen, collapsed)

auth_required.message: Authentication required — please log in manually

rate_limited.description: Too many requests to this site

unknown_error.note: Retry once, then abort if still failing

success_signals.element_click: Page content changed or new page loaded
success_signals.data_extraction: Structured data returned with expected fields
success_signals.file_upload: File name visible in upload field or progress started
success_signals.post_published: Post visible in feed or confirmation shown

vision_fallback_trigger.description: When DOM verification fails, trigger screenshot + vision analysis
triggers: DOM snapshot shows different page than expected
Element refs not found after re-snapshot
Can't determine success from DOM alone
vision_fallback_trigger.action: Take screenshot → analyze with vision model → determine page state
vision_fallback_trigger.use_only_when: DOM verification fails or is ambiguous
